sections.title: Inspection Report Summary
sections.notes: Cover sheet with site name, inspection date, deliverable summary. Built by Agent C's combined wrapper, not embedded from another form.

sections.title: Annual Inspection
sections.notes: Renders the 2-page annual inspection report. Falls back to annual_inspection_legacy or annual_inspection_alt5 depending on source intake.

sections.title: Risers
sections.notes: Renders the per-system riser table. One page when 15 systems or fewer.

sections.title: Fire Pump
sections.notes: Renders fire pump + jockey pump + driver + controller + flow test grid.

sections.title: Fire Hydrants
sections.notes: Renders the 12-slot hydrant inventory table with operated/lubricated/drained columns.

sections.title: Backflow
sections.notes: Renders one backflow page per device tested at the site (Ryder has 2).
